name: Un-Fried French Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Slice each potato lengthwise into 1/4-inch ovals, then slice each oval lengthwise into matchsticks.
3. Coat a baking sheet with 3 sprays of vegetable oil.
4. In a bowl, combine the egg whites and Cajun spice.
5. Add the matchstick potatoes to the bowl and mix to coat evenly.
6. Pour the coated potatoes onto the prepared baking sheet and spread them out into a single layer, leaving space between each fry.
7. Place the baking sheet on the bottom shelf of the oven.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, turning the fries every 6 to 8 minutes with a spatula to ensure even browning.
9. Serve immediately.
These look almost as good as they taste. The Cajun spice lends a bright red hue to the crunchy surface, while the soft inside is snowy white. With half a gram of fat per serving (versus 16 grams for the fried variety), you can munch away guiltlessly. Serve alongside a small bowl of reduced-calorie catsup.
